prompt: audit the architecture of this project — check if the structure follows good patterns

assertions.text: Correctly identifies project as Expo React Native (not web React)
Identifies Convex as the backend layer
Mentions features/demo/ as an existing feature domain
Evaluates screen files in app/ for thickness / complexity
Checks whether import boundaries between layers are respected
Output is a structured report with sections/headings, not just prose paragraphs
Includes specific, actionable recommendations (not just 'looks good')
